requirement_topic.zh: GB/T 20234 接口与 IEC 62196 接口
requirement_topic.zht: GB/T 20234 介面與 IEC 62196 介面

summary.en: For Cote d'Ivoire projects using an IEC basis, charger sockets and fixed cables should be specified against IEC 62196 connector standards, typically Type 2 for AC charging and CCS Combo 2 for DC charging where the vehicle fleet follows the European IEC configuration. Connector choice is a physical interoperability requirement and should be confirmed in the tender, importer specification, and vehicle-fleet plan.
summary.zh: 采用 IEC 依据的科特迪瓦项目中，充电设备插座和固定电缆应按 IEC 62196 连接装置标准指定；若车辆采用欧洲 IEC 配置，交流通常为 Type 2，直流通常为 CCS Combo 2。接口选择属于实体互操作要求，应在招标文件、进口商规格和车辆规划中确认。
summary.zht: 採用 IEC 依據的象牙海岸項目中，充電設備插座和固定電纜應按 IEC 62196 連接裝置標準指定；若車輛採用歐洲 IEC 配置，交流通常為 Type 2，直流通常為 CCS Combo 2。介面選擇屬於實體互操作要求，應在招標文件、進口商規格和車輛規劃中確認。

summary.en: China-market EV chargers commonly use GB/T 20234.2 AC connectors and GB/T 20234.3 DC connectors. These are not physically interchangeable with IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS Combo 2 connector systems, so a connector change usually means a distinct export hardware variant and retesting on that variant.
summary.zh: 中国市场电动汽车充电设备通常使用 GB/T 20234.2 交流接口和 GB/T 20234.3 直流接口。这些接口与 IEC 62196 Type 2 或 CCS Combo 2 系统不能实体互换，因此更换接口通常意味着需要独立出口硬件型号，并在该型号上重新测试。
summary.zht: 中國市場電動汽車充電設備通常使用 GB/T 20234.2 交流介面和 GB/T 20234.3 直流介面。這些介面與 IEC 62196 Type 2 或 CCS Combo 2 系統不能實體互換，因此更換介面通常意味著需要獨立出口硬體型號，並在該型號上重新測試。

gap.en: Do not relabel a GB/T connector model as IEC-compatible. Confirm the target vehicle fleet, choose the IEC 62196 connector set if required, update drawings, ratings, labels, manuals, spare-part lists, and test reports for the export configuration.
gap.zh: 不得将 GB/T 接口型号简单改标为 IEC 兼容。应确认目标车辆群，按需选择 IEC 62196 接口组合，并更新出口配置的图纸、额定值、标签、说明书、备件清单和测试报告。
gap.zht: 不得將 GB/T 介面型號簡單改標為 IEC 相容。應確認目標車輛群，按需選擇 IEC 62196 介面組合，並更新出口配置的圖紙、額定值、標籤、說明書、備件清單和測試報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where tender, project specification, customer fleet, or IEC-route acceptance requires IEC 62196; otherwise a commercial interoperability requirement that must be confirmed project by project
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 connector conformity is the China-market baseline; it does not provide IEC 62196 physical compatibility

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector compatibility is a hardware gate. If the Cote d'Ivoire project is IEC-based, GB/T 20234 connectors should be replaced with the required IEC 62196 connector system before testing and shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口兼容性是硬件门槛。如科特迪瓦项目采用 IEC 依据，应在测试和出货前将 GB/T 20234 接口替换为要求的 IEC 62196 接口系统。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 介面相容性是硬體門檻。如象牙海岸項目採用 IEC 依據，應在測試和出貨前將 GB/T 20234 介面替換為要求的 IEC 62196 介面系統。
